com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random

Interface WeightCollection<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the type of elements in the collection
    All Superinterfaces:
    java.util.Collection<T>, java.lang.Iterable<T>
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ItemsBag, LuckyCollection<T>

    public interface WeightCollection<T>
extends java.util.Collection<T>
    A collection that allows adding elements with associated weights.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(T element, double weight)
      Adds an element to the collection with a specified weight.
      java.util.Map<T,java.lang.Double> toWeightMap()
      Retrieves a map of elements and their associated weights.

      • Methods inherited from interface java.util.Collection

        add, addAll, clear, contains, containsAll, equals, hashCode, isEmpty, iterator, parallelStream, remove, removeAll, removeIf, retainAll, size, spliterator, stream, toArray, toArray

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach

    • Method Detail

      • add

        void add(T element,
         double weight)
        Adds an element to the collection with a specified weight.
        Parameters:
        element - the element to add
        weight - the weight associated with the element

      • toWeightMap

        java.util.Map<T,java.lang.Double> toWeightMap()
        Retrieves a map of elements and their associated weights.
        Returns:
        a map where keys are elements and values are their weights
